prompt: I need to build a dashboard for my SaaS app using Mantine. It should have a sidebar navbar, header, and main content area. I want it to be responsive so the sidebar collapses on mobile.

assertions.name: uses-appshell
assertions.evidence: AppShell with header and navbar props

assertions.name: responsive-burger
assertions.text: Uses separate mobile/desktop Burger toggles with hiddenFrom/visibleFrom
assertions.evidence: Two Burger components, one with hiddenFrom='sm' and one with visibleFrom='sm'

assertions.name: navlink-navigation
assertions.text: Uses NavLink for sidebar navigation items
assertions.evidence: NavLink used for all nav items including nested children

assertions.name: responsive-collapse
assertions.text: AppShell navbar has breakpoint and collapsed props
assertions.evidence: navbar={{ width: 260, breakpoint: 'sm', collapsed: { mobile: !mobileOpened, desktop: !desktopOpened } }}

assertions.name: uses-mantine-hooks
assertions.evidence: useDisclosure imported from @mantine/hooks, used for mobileOpened and desktopOpened

assertions.name: color-scheme-toggle
assertions.evidence: ColorSchemeToggle component using useMantineColorScheme with toggleColorScheme

assertions.name: no-raw-css-heights
assertions.text: Does not use hardcoded pixel values for layout
assertions.evidence: Uses Mantine spacing/sizing props throughout, header uses height: 60 via AppShell header prop

assertions.name: uses-appshell
assertions.evidence: AppShell with header and navbar props

assertions.name: responsive-burger
assertions.evidence: Two Burger components with hiddenFrom and visibleFrom props

assertions.name: navlink-navigation
assertions.evidence: NavLink used for all nav items

assertions.name: responsive-collapse
assertions.text: AppShell navbar has breakpoint and collapsed props
assertions.evidence: navbar={{ width: 260, breakpoint: 'sm', collapsed: { mobile: !mobileOpened, desktop: !desktopOpened } }}

assertions.name: no-raw-css-heights
assertions.text: Does not use hardcoded pixel values
assertions.evidence: Uses inline style={{ borderRadius: 6 }} on NavLink and padding: '1.5rem' on metric cards
